productDisplayName: Nike Men's Dunk Low Black Shoe
description: Designed for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk Low has a heel counter to provide ample structural support, protecting the ankle from sprains and injuries while running. Coupled with an uber cool look is its superior traction feature that makes the nike Dunk Low a huge favourite both on the track and off it. If you enjoy donning that sporty look, simply pair the Dunk Low with jeans and casual tees.Upper Synthetic and textile upper for maximum ventilation and durability Padded tongue and textile lined sockliner for snug Fit and added protection from shock Lace-up system for snug fit Midsole Full length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protection Mildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Flexible multi-directional rubber outsole with a full cupsole stitch for durability Semi-circular grooved forefoot with pivot point for easy 180° rotation of the foot without causing injury shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
